channel.title: Dream Space on by stephanie navarro
channel.description: Recent content in Dream Space on by stephanie navarro

item.title: the girl
item.description:
maybe we’ll all dance one day bare feet on dewy grass- my pains my sunshines my strengths my weaknesses- maybe one day we’ll creep out of the shadows and show the world our faces.

the light and the dark.

I’ll walk the hallways of my memory and gather all my selves hold hands with the version of me who stayed too long hug the one who left.

we’ll travel together take inventory of new shapes, introduce each other to the things we’ve lost.

item.title: untitled 00
item.description:
I still pray the way she taught me.

I used to ask God with all my heart to let me fly I used to ask God with all my heart to let me die.

item.title: The People Are Dying Here
item.description:
The people are dying there, the people are crying there.

Little boys run through the streets, crumpled bills in their pockets, selling fruit under the sky, minds worn from the hot sun.

Little girls push their legs closed, and keep their mouths shut, sneak their eyes open during prayer, fingertips burnt from flipping tortillas.

They watch someone’s dreams play out on a neighbor’s TV. They’re hungry for more.

The children are dying there, the children are crying there.

item.title: behind the walls
item.description:
little woman, big girl.

the garden i grow is a home you’ll never see; a world you’ll never know.

I worked tirelessly, living only off of the hope that you would see it and smile.

I dream of it the day our hands touch again. I’ll show you all the fruit I grew out of my tears and you’ll pick me up and we’ll run across the world leaving my garden to rot.
